ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the game */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the game was released */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the game */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the game */,
  "esrb_rating" TEXT /* ESRB rating (e.g., E, E10+, T, M, AO) */,
  "PEGI_rating" TEXT /* PEGI rating (e.g., 3+, 7+, 12+, 16+, 18+) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being rated */,
  "critic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the critic or platform providing the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating score (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was published */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., critic, user, overall) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_critic_id FOREIGN KEY ("critic_id") REFERENCES game_critics ("critic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being sold */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the game was sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the game was sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of copies sold */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated from the sale */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "bundle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bundle (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the game */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the price (e.g., USD, EUR, JPY) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the price takes effect */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the price expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "is_action" INTEGER /* Whether the game is an action game */,
  "is_exclusive_to_us" INTEGER /* Whether the game is exclusive to the US */,
  "is_portable" INTEGER /* Whether the game is portable */,
  "is_role_playing" INTEGER /* Whether the game is a role-playing game */,
  "is_sequel" INTEGER /* Whether the game is a sequel */,
  "is_sports" INTEGER /* Whether the game is a sports game */,
  "suitable_for_kids" INTEGER /* Whether the game is suitable for kids */,
  "has_multiplayer" INTEGER /* Whether the game has multiplayer capabilities */,
  "has_online_play" INTEGER /* Whether the game has online play capabilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_features_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_critics" (
  "critic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each critic */,
  "critic_name" TEXT /* Name of the critic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the critic */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Expertise of the critic (e.g., PC, console, handheld) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("critic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bundled_games" (
  "bundle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bundle */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the bundle */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bundle */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the bundle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bundle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bundle_games" (
  "bundle_game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bundle game */,
  "bundle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bundle */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bundle_game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bundle_games_bundle_id FOREIGN KEY ("bundle_id") REFERENCES bundled_games ("bundle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bundle_games_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, analyst) */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the user (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_games" (
  "collection_game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection game */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_games_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_games_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES game_collections ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded for the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_achievements_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_dlc" (
  "dlc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DLC */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the DLC */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the DLC */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the DLC */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dlc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_dlc_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
